description: Create a Talon voice module in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\crypto_tools\ to encode, decode, and hash text. In crypto_actions.py, define a Talon Module with actions: crypto_b64_encode (Base64 encode), crypto_b64_decode (Base64 decode with "Invalid Base64" notification on failure), crypto_hash_sha256 (SHA-256 hex digest), and crypto_hash_md5 (MD5 hex digest). In crypto_actions.talon, map the phrases "crypto base encode", "crypto base decode", "crypto hash two fifty six", and "crypto hash md five" to these actions such that they copy selected text, process it, and insert the result. A sample text file with IOCs is provided on the desktop for testing.
